content: But always until about ten years ago, I was somehow or another drawn back to the road and hitchhiking and camping out under the stars, sleeping under the stars, or in a tent and constantly just sort of... moving along without any picked destination most of the time. In the last ten or twelve years, having grown older and weaker, I suppose you might say physically, I've settled into a stationary existence, although still tent camping in an urban setting, and that's where I find myself today. So, in a nutshell, that's the history of my progression through these 62 years of life. years ago, I was a habitual drinker and user of marijuana, although I could do without both for any amount of time at any
